explanation: Added extra spaces between arguments and used quotes around the service name to simulate potential bypass via insertion and spacing techniques.
Used lowercase 'binPath' instead of 'BINPATH=' to test case-insensitive parsing and simulate substitution of equivalent syntax.
Wrapped the executable name in quotes to test parsing behavior with quoted paths, simulating insertion techniques.
Removed the space between BINPATH= and the value to test if the command still parses correctly, simulating omission techniques.
Wrapped the entire BINPATH argument in quotes to test if the command still functions, simulating insertion techniques.
